title: MasterClass 25 cm Deep Cake Tin with PFOA Non Stick and Loose Bottom, 1 mm Carbon Steel, 10 Inch Square Pan
features: EXCEPTIONAL NON STICK: with 2 layers of Quantum II non stick, this deep cake tin releases food easily and cleans in seconds
ROBUST: the cake pan is made of 1 mm-thick, warp-resistant carbon steel, which is oven safe to 220°C (428°F)
LOOSE BOTTOM: the pop-up base ensures neat results, so it's ideal for baking impressive bottom tiers, or large fruit or sponge cakes
International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
description: From the manufacturer Cook with Confidence KitchenCraft's premium brand with over 600 deluxe kitchen tools, gadgets, knives and accessories including its acclaimed bakeware collection. Always find the size you need MasterClass's square cake tins are marked with their size for easy identification. Collect them all and you'll always have the size you need ready to go. MasterClass Loose-Base Deep Square Cake Tin (25 cm) Great for fruit cakes, sponges and wedding cake tiers Perfect your cake baking repertoire with this MasterClass square cake tin. With its heavyweight carbon steel design and handy size markings, it takes the hassle out of regular baking, and thanks to its clever non-stick coating, you won’t have to suffer crumbled cakes or burnt-on bits again. At 25 cm (10 inches) wide and 7.5 cm (3 inches) deep, the tin is great for baking larger, extra-tall fruit and sponge cakes. You can also use it to bake the base or middle tier for a unique wedding or celebration cake. Fridge, freezer and dishwasher safe. Really easy to clean, thanks to its Quantum II coating. Heat safe up 220 degrees Celsius (428 degrees Fahrenheit). 100 per cent PFOA, PTFE and BPA-free. Carbon Steel for Maximum Durability This heavy-duty square cake pan is made of 1 mm-thick, commercial-grade carbon steel. Its sheer strength means it will never deform in the heat of your oven – even with regular use. That’s not all. The carbon steel has been sandblasted to help secure its non-stick coating, and electroplated, which helps it to resist corrosion. The result? A practical, durable cake pan that will last for years if properly cared for. Quantum II – Next-Level Non-Stick This square cake pan is coated with a double non-stick layer of Quantum II, which releases cakes quickly and without trouble. And with its loose base, it gets even easier – just push the cake up and out from the base for a clean, undamaged result. Like the pan itself, Quantum II is reinforced for greater durability, with special ceramic materials embedded in the non-stick layer to enhance performance. The state-of-the-art coating is designed to outperform all conventional non-sticks, and is made with safe silicone – it's 100 per cent PFOA, BPA and PTFE-free. Bakeware by MasterClass This pan is one of several non-stick deep square cake tins in the MasterClass non-stick bakeware collection. It can be combined with the larger and smaller tins to create spectacular wedding and Christmas cakes. Each tin is clearly marked with sizes to make choosing the right one from your cupboard easy. Why not combine it with the 15 cm (KCMCHB62), 18 cm (KCMCHB38), 20 cm (KCMCHB26), 23 cm (KCMCHB35) and 30 cm (KCMCHB56) cake tins and unleash your baking creativity?
